bonus_items.title: Broken access control on /transfer
bonus_items.evidence: /transfer performs money movement without requiring authentication or verifying that the caller owns the source account

bonus_items.title: No auth on /files download endpoint
bonus_items.evidence: /files/<path:name> has no authentication or authorization check. Any requester can download stored files

bonus_items.title: Negative transfer amounts allowed
bonus_items.evidence: transfer accepts negative amounts. A negative transfer increases the source balance and decreases the destination balance

bonus_items.title: Hard-coded SECRET_KEY in source
bonus_items.evidence: Token signing uses a hard-coded SECRET_KEY shipped in source. Anyone with the code can forge valid tokens

bonus_items.title: Transfer accepts negative amounts
bonus_items.evidence: transfer does not reject negative amounts ... allowing balance manipulation

bonus_items.title: Self-transfer creates money
bonus_items.evidence: Transferring from an account to itself creates money because the second update overwrites the first

bonus_items.title: /transfer lacks authn/authz
bonus_items.evidence: /transfer performs money movement without authentication or authorization

bonus_items.title: /files download lacks authn/authz
bonus_items.evidence: /files/<path:name> exposes file downloads without authentication or ownership checks

bonus_items.title: Hardcoded token signing key
bonus_items.evidence: The token signing key is a hardcoded constant ... can forge valid-looking tokens

fp_items.evidence: Token signing uses a hardcoded, public secret key ... can forge tokens

bonus_items.title: Negative/zero transfer amount not rejected
bonus_items.evidence: transfer does not reject zero or negative amounts. A negative amount increases the source balance

bonus_items.title: Same-account transfer creates money
bonus_items.evidence: Transferring from an account to itself creates money: both src and dst read the same starting balance

bonus_items.title: Transfer endpoint lacks authentication/authorization
bonus_items.evidence: POST /transfer performs fund transfers without authentication or authorization

bonus_items.title: File serving endpoint lacks authentication
bonus_items.evidence: GET /files/<name> exposes stored files without authentication or authorization
